stemHtml: With reference to Mode S transponders, which statement is correct? The reported altitude data..

options.a: could be accurate to 25 ft resolution but it is dependent on the altitude sensor systems on board the aircraft.
options.b: could be accurate to 25 ft resolution and is independent of the altitude sensor systems on board the aircraft.
options.c: must be accurate to 100 ft resolution and be independent of the altitude sensor systems on board the aircraft.
options.d: must be accurate to 25 ft resolution and be dependent on the altitude sensor systems on board the aircraft.
